sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block position and white cross
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Current objects ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['O', 'b', 'W', 'w'] and node['pixels'] > 3:
        print(f"Color={node['color']}, boundary={node['boundary']}, pixels={node['pixels']}")

# Check the left area where white cross was
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Left area (rows 25-40, cols 15-30) ===")
for r in range(25, 41):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_grid[r][15:30]}")

# Check if white cross still exists
has_white = False
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['W', 'w']:
        has_white = True
        print(f"\nWhite cross found: color={node['color']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")
if not has_white:
    print("\nNo white cross found - it was collected!")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
